name: job_posting
description: Extracts structured information from a job posting for a software engineering role.

fields.name: company_name
fields.description: The name of the hiring company or organization.

fields.name: job_title
fields.description: The exact job title as stated in the posting.

fields.name: required_skills
fields.description: Technologies, languages, frameworks, or methodologies explicitly required for the role.

fields.name: preferred_skills
fields.description: Skills listed as nice-to-have, preferred, or a bonus — but not strictly required.

fields.name: years_experience_min
fields.description: Minimum years of experience required. Extract the lower bound of any range.

fields.name: years_experience_max
fields.description: Maximum years of experience stated. Extract the upper bound of any range, or null if only a minimum is given.

fields.name: salary_min
fields.description: Minimum annual salary in the local currency as a plain integer with no symbols or commas.

fields.name: salary_max
fields.description: Maximum annual salary in the local currency as a plain integer with no symbols or commas.

fields.name: location
fields.description: Primary work location: city, state/country, or 'Remote'.

fields.name: remote_policy
fields.description: The company's remote work policy as stated or implied.

fields.name: employment_type
fields.description: Whether the role is full-time, part-time, contract, or other.
